name: jharkhand-tribal-marketplace
description: A full-stack e-commerce platform for Jharkhand tribal products

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.build: npm run build-frontend && npm run build-admin
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin

author: Jharkhand Tribal Products Marketplace
